channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Ai doomers are broke edition >Educational sites: >Financial TV Streams: >Charts: >Screeners: so you feel like in the mov… — 320 replies — 1280.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Ai doomers are broke edition >Educational sites: >Financial TV Streams: >Charts: >Screeners: so you feel like in the mov…

Open thread • Replies: 320 • Updated: 2026-04-27 07:42 UTC

OP

Ai doomers are broke edition

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com
https://www.khanacademy.org/economics-finance-domain

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners: so you feel like in the movies
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101: so zoomers with meme stocks can outperform you
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc smg:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

>NEW THREAD: Copy-paste the following when making a new thread:
https://pastebin.com/GfB48W5G

Previously on /smg/
>>62159050

Early replies (first 3)

62160175
> futures

62160179
>>62160175
Why he mean to turtle ;_;

62160182
>>62160179
it is an ancient rivalry

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62160914
>>62160905
>A lot of big companies and important people have a ton of money invested privately into them.
They cash out into the rebalances.
Private investors win.
Banks sponsoring the IPO win.
The financial services companies win (the SP500 and NASDAQ).
Eventually even the fund managers will be able to charge higher fees to "counter" these IPO nukes.
The ONLY losers are the passive investors.

Those insiders have already won and cashed out when the inclusion happens.
>https://wtvbam.com/2026/04/23/analysis-biggest-ipo-wave-in-history-promises-3-trillion-in-value-with-no-profits/
>>62160903
Probably for the best.

62160918
I’m gonna throw 50% of my port (cash) into soxl. What am I in for

62160922
>>62160914
>Probably for the best.
I'm too imbibed to put effort into anything else but will resume later. But please listen to that album on your next long drive. Diamonds are ranked on refractive properties of brilliance and fire, and that album is a gem.

62160928
>>62160913
I relish in the knowledge that you will suffer first and for longer than anyone else you retarded fucking migger scum.

62160929
I hate that SOXL has become so popular. Too many people getting into leveraged ETFs without realising how bad the risks can be

62160931
>>62160169
I'm the biggest retard ever, I should have bought sandisk and seagate stocks last year, I really fell for the AI bubble collapse meme...........fuck me, what do I buy to make up for that dumbass choice?

62160940
>>62160929
>sour grapes
It's okay anon, I missed out too

62160943
>>62160931
Retards should invest in index funds

62160949
>>62160918
You will 2x your portfolio's net worth by the end of next month if it keeps going.

62160951
I kirkenuinely FOMOd into semis, what am I in for?

62160956
>>62160951
A little more momentum from positive earnings. Then it'll either dip and you'll regret it a bit or it'll crab along consolidating.
I unironically believe semis are undervalued so long as the bubble isn't popped. Baring a crash they will keep grinding up.

62160960
3 minutes until impact

62160962
>>62160956
>momentum
https://distill.pub/2017/momentum/
I linked an article on momentum and gradient descent

62160963
ASS

62160964
>>62160169
Of course. AI is new slavery. Robot slaves replace human workers.
And I do mean replace.
Wagies NEED rich people to give them income.
Rich people will replace wagies with robots and won't need most wages at all.

62160965
>>62160960
That's what she said.

62160966
>>62160894
>>62160910
I want to buy SpaceX but most of the time, the IPO price is WAY inflated and you have to wait until after insiders sell to pick it up.

62160967
>>62160963
I have been finding arbitrage on SPY options surface, why does this happen?

62160972
>>62160966
Discord
SpaceX
Anthropic
OpenAI

You're retarded if you don't buy all these and just hold.

62160977
>>62160972
you are retarded if you hold the bags for the bottom 3 lol.
>IT'S GOING TO 10 TRILLION

62160981
fuck me fuck my ass

>>62160964
rich people will them pay some wagies to protect them from the cannibal gangs of former wagies because it turns out unbalancing the underpinning of sociey is a bad idea, your bunker won't actually protect you from a determined army and your factories and power plants and fields are all very vulnerable.

62160988
>>62160972
I wouldn't go near anything Elon is involved with. The democrats will be in power next and they will be gunning for him after his doge nonsense.

62160991
>>62160988
watch him try and pivot back to le reddit iron man persona and claim he was off his meds or some shit
speaking of RDDT...might pick up a couple ahead of earnings

62160994
>>62160988
Democrats made Elon rich.......

62160995
>>62160988
>I wouldn't go near anything Elon is involved with. The democrats will be in power next and they will be gunning for him after his doge nonsense.

62161000
>>62160994
Then he shit on them. That makes it worse.

62161010
how long till photonics rotation ends, its starting to feel nervous of my holdingfs

62161012
why bears crying on catalog when nothing moves up right now??

62161013
>>62161012

62161014
>>62160988
>tfw she was right all along, guys

item.title: Today I've staked my 4k link bag. How does it make you feel? Staking pool is closed you might ask? Yeah, but I'm still I… — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today I've staked my 4k link bag. How does it make you feel? Staking pool is closed you might ask? Yeah, but I'm still I…

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-27 07:45 UTC

OP

Today I've staked my 4k link bag. How does it make you feel?

Staking pool is closed you might ask? Yeah, but I'm still I've staked everything on the main pool.

Should I even be telling this or would it be wiser to stay silent like everyone else? To make sure my APY stays as high as possible?

Early replies (first 3)

62160919
>>62160907
Congratulations! Wise decision indeed

62160942
>>62160907
>on the main pool
sdl's bot has taken every available space in the last week with tens of thousands of link. filthy larp.

62160950
>>62160942
Try the last year. Unless you want to script your staking wallet to get in, you only have the sub 50 LINK openings which won’t get immediately filled

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62160976
>>62160950
>which won’t get immediately filled
not true at all, that bot fills the same fucking block with any amount of link

62160980
>>62160942
And? They're still staked on the main pool. On the main chainlink staking contract.

62160986
>>62160980

62160993
>>62160986
Well, receipt is just a nice bonus on top of your tokens that are on the main staking contract. You can choose to either use the receipt for further profits or just keep it inside your HW wallet.

62161006
>>62160993
>a reciept from the team that previously rugged it's old token holders is still a receipt lololol
how good is your knowledge of the past about sdl and even other "staking" platforms which resulted in many rekt marines. if it's not the official pool it's a SCAM.

62161017
>>62161006
Yep and the receipt is still a bonus I can choose to use or not. If migrating to a new token contract is a scam and means you won't stake your tokens and enjoy free money means you have pretty low IQ. Well the way you write pretty much gave that out already lol.

item.title: FUCKING FUCK OFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF — 21 replies — 28.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
FUCKING FUCK OFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-04-27 07:09 UTC

OP

FUCKING FUCK OFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

Early replies (first 3)

62160342
>>62160326
NOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

62160359
reminder that 60k was the bottom

62160362
>>62160359
NO NO NO NO
Every influencer told me we all can buy low in october

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62160365
>>62160326
>+0.50%

62160501
>>62160326
It can pump, it can dump. It is all fake.

62160516
>>62160501
This. Don't get cocky on wafer thin weekend volume. WallSt can and will manipulate the fuck out of things to get the number they want. They'll probably dump again back to 77,777 just for shits and giggles again.

62160518
This pump is retarded and you all know it.

62160545
Why is it going up the global stock market is about to crash from oil shortages wtf I am losing everything

62160552
Another "ceasefire has been extended after talks in Pakistan" headline has the market feeling bullish

62160557
>>62160518
Seeing all those shorts get their stop-losses triggered was fucking beautiful, but yeah, this shit is dumb. Don't pump when Strategy is about to do it for everyone anyway.
>>62160552
Wasn't it already extended indefinitely? And even then, are people really still hedging bets on Trump flip flopping all over the place?

62160820
>>62160326
Came in here to say it's a low volume pump on a Sunday, it'll crash, but I just checked the price and it already did.

62160825
>>62160545
leverage, fomo, momentum, greed

62160837
Why are we crashing now? o_O We were doing so well, jesuschrist.

62160843
>>62160837
lol

62160860
>>62160843
you laugh?

62160865
>>62160860
lmao

62160877
>>62160837
did you think 99.999%ile gains would be followed by more gains? what is the bullish narrative exactly? the economy and society are all fucked up at this point in time.

62160878
>>62160877
ummm boomers get to sell and dab on you for the next decade. thank you for your attention to this matter

62160884
>>62160877
There is so much money that we can't crash. Why would we crash when there is so much money to pump the stock market every single day? There is so much money that the real world doesn't even matter.

62160971
>>62160837
See
>>62160516

62160973
Fake bobos, real Bobos are hybernating after the onslaught that occurred from Octobear to January

item.title: WHATS HAPPENING? — 11 replies — 14.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHATS HAPPENING?

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-04-27 07:07 UTC

OP

WHATS HAPPENING?

Early replies (first 3)

62160322
>>62160311
Manipulation, probably

62160323
>>62160311
We're dumping

62160324
>>62160311
Bottomtober queers are getting liquidated.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62160345
It's Sunday you fuckers. You're not supposed to pump your bags this much on a weekend.

62160360
>>62160345
it's nigger monday in china

62160522
>>62160345
Big News Monday ;-)

62160530
>>62160522
No doubt. But moving things too far away from the Friday close is just begging for all kinds of Jewry. You don't fuck with the institutional money.

62160534
Nature is healing

62160842
>>62160311
Lel

62160885
>>62160311
choke on dick you smug little faggot

62160969
Called it. You don't fuck with the big money.

item.title: Fucking piece of shit — 7 replies — 10.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Fucking piece of shit

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-04-27 07:13 UTC

OP

I just turned 37 today. I spent my bithday drinking vodka in my apartment alone because my gf won't stop bitching at me to sell half of my LINK to buy health insurance for the painful bump that has formed on my neck. I keep telling that bitch that it will go away with time if I keep applying avacado oil but she will just not shut the fuck up so I chose to ghost her today. Honestly I'm thinking of making her go away forever. The only thing she ever does is shill Pyth and XRP and a couple other shitcoins. I've tried to explain to her that I am a linkmarine and I don't fall for the goytraps but she just does it again the next day and I'm starting to think that I don't need that kind of negativity in my life.

Early replies (first 3)

62160343
>>62160341
This is a fantasy because women are not into crypto

62160344
>>62160341
buy an ad.
CLEAN IT UP JANNIES.

62160357
>>62160341
FREE RENT

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62160394
>>62160341
If by gf you mean bf

62160544
>>62160341
the suffering of stinkies is music to my ears :}
imagine all the sexual partnerships that have fallen apart because of drama related to link's underperformance :}

62160925
>>62160341
happy birthday OP!
Try to save up, but keep your LINK if you can!

62160982
>>62160544
Lol mentally ill faggot how are you doing today

item.title: We're gonna be SO rich. — 5 replies — 4.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
We're gonna be SO rich.

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-04-27 06:47 UTC

OP

>hope you bought /biz/

Early replies (first 3)

62157870
>>62157847
The amount of paki shill this coin has makes me wanna short it, but its just fell off another cliff, so maybe not the best time....

62158063
I was on the original on Ethereum for ages, like $7,000. Then the day he was sworn into office he launched his own MAGA on Solana making the original incorrectly read as price increased because they crossed beams. Motherfucker just had to endorse the one that existed and i would've make $50,000

But noooo, he lost everyone money instead.

The money president lost everyone money when it should've been an easy win, because they wanted full control over their own token. and even one wasn't enough, they dropped Melania a few days later, and even that wasn't enough, they shat out World Liberty Financial.

62158217
>>62158063
Greed, he will shat out another one since this trump coin has no more liq left in, niggers still has 70% to dump for literal pesos....

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62158222
>>62157870
You can't short ethereum shitcoins. I wish you could since 90% of them are rugpulls that eventually land near zero

62160944
>>62157847
Are you rich yet patel?

item.title: Loan — 3 replies — 3.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Loan

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-04-27 06:58 UTC

OP

What happens if a person moves from country A to B while they have an unpaid consumer loan from a bank in country A? Can the bankers hunt them down and seize their assets in country B to repay the load or something else?
Let's assume country A is outside the EU, and B is in the EU, different languages and currencies. If it varies by amount of debt, let's say the equivalent of $30k in debt to the bank.

Early replies (first 3)

62158878
Stay in your shithole country, Dikpreet Sukdeep.

62160932
>>62158609
Only when proven of intent to do so. Now when you posted this shit you are fucked.

62160959
>>62158609
Unfortunately jews will ally with anyone when it comes for their money. Its not gonna work anon.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: BTC $80K waiting room — 2 replies — 0.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC $80K waiting room

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-04-27 05:40 UTC

OP

BVLL runners get set GO

Early replies (first 3)

62160559
>>62160554
its not hitting 80k tonight mumu

62160838
>>62160554
Lol

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Do you flex your BTC to your family or nah? — 68 replies — 21.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Do you flex your BTC to your family or nah?

Open thread • Replies: 68 • Updated: 2026-04-27 04:45 UTC

OP

Wondering if people actually talk about their BTC with family or just keep it lowkey.

>We never really know how long we have in life, so is it better to share it or keep it private?

Early replies (first 3)

62138671
>>62138453
I only have 1 so that's nothing to flex

62138680
People with more money than you won't give a shit and people with less money than you will resent you.

Keep your mouth shut and if anyone questions your purchases or your lifestyle, pretend to be in debt.

62138700
>>62138453
Keep that shit private, openly talking about how much money you have casually is trashy. Only discuss money with family with the intention of planning / sharing, otherwise they'll always have the thought that you have more to yourself. Speaking from experience with a good family, money brings out the absolute worst in people.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62149941
>>62138453
Only my brother knows I bought BTC, we both stake together now as well, with native staking gaining traction. Imagine if I told my parents to buy at 120K Kek.

62150719
>>62142197
You never know

62150903
>>62148933
Still it has risks

62151073
>>62146671
I get that, but it’s better to check first before saying that. So far, it fits my standards. I don’t think firms like Ledger or even A16z would back it otherwise.

62151201
>>62148936
Greedy bastard

62151260
>>62151073
it's the same thing. Everything will fail in the end. Nothing survive

62151310
NEVER

62151368
>>62149941
Heartaches

62151461
>>62138453
How do we confess them?

62151818
>>62149941
Nice are you also waiting for the TBV launch? More interesting for me since it could unlock more use cases.

62152719
>>62142226
That's the goal lol

62152732
never ever tell anyone you own any crypto holy shit that is like rule #1 in life don't tell me you idiots are trying to orange pill your fucking friends and family

62152763
>>62138453
Why would you ever brag about your money? Especially when every cryptobro is a scrawny geek. Do you want to get tortured by niggers for your private key?

Secret wealthy is better

62153574
>>62150903
Every system has risk. The difference is just what kind of risk you’re exposed to and how much control you still keep over your assets.

62153589
>>62152732
Maybe it depends on who you’re closest to in your family. There’s usually one person you really vibe with.

62153929
>>62152763
Do what you wanna do

62154078
>>62142464
This here is the right play. Don't tell anyone how much money you have or flaunt it. It should be used to give you freedom not ego validation. Also when you reveal wealth to people they will try to use you and get some for themselves. Donate to charity and volunteer also though of course.

62154092
If you talk about bitcoin, people either assume you’re a sucker, a drug dealer, evading taxation, or a pedophile. I think what really limits its reach is that it’s technology, economics and political philosophy wrapped into an asset. Never selling.

62155160
>>62142464
Well...she's still your gf so do that...

62155300
>>62154092
Think the opposite

62155673
>>62155300
What’s the opposite?

62155774
I haven't told anyone how much I have invested, I just tell them my various investment schemes so they hopefully do something.
It's especially important for the kids because their zog parents tell them not to invest and to get a car for MUH FREEDOMS.

62155914
>>62151310
Ok, that's not a problem

62156005
Guys check out my crypto currency called hsgold I’m going to add a fair bit of liquidity at the end of the month when I get paid check it out highseasgold currently swapable for sol

62156014
>>62138453
That's RULE NUMBER ONE of the Ten Crack Commandments anon.

62157978
>>62138453
Don't do it

62158303
>>62154078
You are right too. Let's see anon.

62160744
>>62157978
Yeah okay anon

62160748
>>62156005
Memecoin again . hard pass

62160749
>>62155774
Just teach your family on how to be in crypto.

item.title: Why the FUCK is life so fucking difficult (particularly the financial aspect of it). — 59 replies — 10.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why the FUCK is life so fucking difficult (particularly the financial aspect of it).

Open thread • Replies: 59 • Updated: 2026-04-27 02:11 UTC

OP

Why the FUCK is life so fucking difficult (particularly the financial aspect of it).

Early replies (first 3)

62155115
>>62155108
it's the way capitalism works, it's an annihilationist force that is counter to life. it will continue until we're all dead and earth has been completely liquidated. I dont' know why we do this to ourselves

>uncleted.jpg

62155117
LUCK is the biggest factor in life.

62155122
>>62155115
Just like cancer

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62155675
>>62155108
in the past (pre 2020) it used to be cause people didnt know how to invest and bought shit they didnt need. now its wealth inequality, they're literally siphoning all producitivity gains

62155705
I find it easy to save and invest, but it’s extraordinarily difficult to find an opportunity, go all-in with size, and do a 10x. In this life, you either accept wagecuckery until 62-65, you hypergamble in the market, or you become an entrepreneur.

62155765
>>62155705
Yeah, 10x's are hard but 2x's just happen consistently, so it's more about doing it when you're younger.
A little bit of wagecuckery chasing 2x's goes a long way when you're 20 and those will double like 4 times before retirement.

62155773
>>62155765
The issue is you see an asset that is going parabolic, you say “yeah, this is it” and then it does 2x, 4x, etc. but the very fucking moment you hop in, you’re down 30 percent. Right now, everyone is getting rich on the AI bottleneck trade. If I wasn’t holding bitcoin, I’d just say fuck it and hop in.

62155777
>>62155198
>you could literally live with your parents, collect welfare and then go all in on stocks while eating chicken tendies. how is it difficult? you're lucky you weren't born during the middle ages
lmao literally me except i dont eat tendies
i am currently investing 100% in ftse all world and while it grows well idk if i can escape the neet life with it. also i can also only save up to 10k before the state cuts my neet money
dont even know what i would do with the money if i got lucky

62155782
>>62155773
I've been holding more cash specifically because of the AI stuff, I still invest but I think some kind of downturn is coming and I want to be able to jump at opportunities.
I really would never go all-in on some kind of "ai bottleneck", it's just gambling. Sure, gamble with 25% if you really want to.

Recently houses have been going for 100k in my area (lockport new york because people will say this is fake) and I'm waiting for an even further dip as boomers die off, which has actually been happening because all land owners in my area are 75.

62155861
>>62155782
The outsized returns come with the gambling. Don’t get me wrong, all of my money is in VOO and bitcoin. But it causes deep distress to see people printing off of leveraged sector ETFs. Real estate is sometimes the move. Homes that were $100k in 2002 are now sometimes $1.3m. But I’ve also seen other areas that were the next big thing, and they’ve crabbed for decades.

My take? New York has had net population losses for a while. Buffalo is doing better in recent years, but will it extend to Lockport? Unsure.

62155878
>>62155115
>>62155122
>>62155117
Can't believe you retards haven't figured out the real answer. I'll give you a hint, it's jews.

62155879
>>62155861
>But will it extend to Lockport?
It already has, but in rural areas. My city is in a decline in population and nobody's making any money here and never will, which is where my edge comes in.
Since I'm not 75 and not literally dying to sell off my shit to pay for a new truck I can get along maintaining and renting houses, and it's no big loss to have one I have to sell because I can do basically all cosmetic work myself.

But people are desperate to escape city shitholes so small suburb areas and even lockport have seen buffalo growth.

62155881
>>62155108
Because of genetic determinism and how the modern world works. We have abundance thanks to modern tech and slave labor from third world countries but everyone wants to have access to the wealth. Meanwhile the state simply prints more money making your money worth less. The only way to counter this is by having assets that are not bound to this or scale higher then inflation. We still have law of nature, the fittest aka the most adaptable wins and will be on top, just that most people who would die normally are being dragged on for some reason.

62155923
>>62155108
just stop caring
i havent done laundry in over a year. my apartment is a disaster and i eat like once every 3-4 days out of pure lazyness.
i have no friends never go out other than work.
i take several stimulants to keep my brain on autopilot at work so im not really "there"
i recently lost the will to commute so i just uber it both ways
when i get home i just rot in bed, look at the numbers move and watch oneyplays until i pass out.
sometimes ill play something on my 'eck if im feeling especially motivated.
i just dont care anymore.

62155978
>>62155108
too many people

62156145
>>62155259
>you are framed and jailed for sexual assault,
kek, definitely a thing that happens to normal, well-adjusted people

62156342
>>62155878
jews are huma....oh wait!

62156367
>>62155198
What to invest in tho?
Nothing gives more than 5% annual returns these days unless you do degenerate options gambling

62156382
>>62155130
>where it was financially optimal to take care of your cows and pigs so that they lived happy lives
This is impossible regardless of how well you treat your livestock. Beef cattle are typically slaughtered when they're somewhere between 1-2 years old. Dairy cattle are slaughtered once their milk production starts to decline, around 5 years old.

The natural lifespan of a cow is 20-30 years. You could treat your cattle incredibly well but you're still killing them when they're basically children. Killing a 1-2 year old cow is equivalent to killing a 6-8 year old human. If you were treated very well for the first 8 years of your life before being slaughtered so some alien species could eat you, would you consider that you lived a happy life?

62156385
>>62155108
in order for the few percentage of rich population to enjoy the leisure time, you need a society of people jsut barely getting by so they need to be at work as much as possible making either you or your rich buddies money. all the while keeping you out of their way for a majority of the week.

62156388
>>62156382
I'd have been eaten in 2000, being a wagecuck in 2026.

62156412
>>62155159
seriously though I have this, idk, risk aversion disability where even if something is 99% likely to make big gains if I just hold for a year, I will constantly panic sell and then cry afterwards. I don't know what the fuck is wrong with me. It's happened like 5 times now.

62156445
>>62155923
>oneyplays

dude go get some help tf

62156449
>>62156367
you have to gamble if you want to win. There are too many people on earth for you to make it without taking on risk.

62156515
>>62156476
pretty much nailed it

62156850
>>62155878
Stop noticing

62158142
>>62156388
The correct way

62159587
>>62155173
Tell that to the software engineers who are all getting fired.

62160155
>>62155242
>be white
>pay taxes
>COVID destroys everything Ive ever built
>mexicans get shit tons of free money
>Trump doesn't deport all of them
>releases a shitcoin that dumps
>no doge money
>IRS still exists

Quite literally nothing good financially has come to me trying to be a good goy

I think right wingers are just retarded goys. Trump is likely to go down as the biggest fucking liar in history. Atleast Biden got his missions done, money to illegals and such.

I should of just sold drugs and gotten circumcised.

Sieg Hiel.

62160160
>>62155259
Everything you mentioned that sucks later in life is based on relations with women. Wise anon. Women are the devil.

62160302
>>62156412
having a job helps because you can always make more money and take more shots.

half these people are unemployed looking to 100x 8k and they only get one shot lol.

62160337
I was born with no luck and currently at 36 I have no money and cant find a job
I am just waiting to die

62160478
Capitalism became too unregulated and too unbalanced in favor of the rich.
>I want to open a $1 burger stand next to a McDonalds
>I would be hit with lawsuits about lack of licenses and anti-monopoly practices
BUT
>coporations bring in endless cheap brown labor to side step all the labor laws
>worker can't sue over this or the anti-labor laws

item.title: Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET? — 76 replies — 9.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Open thread • Replies: 76 • Updated: 2026-04-27 00:12 UTC

OP

Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Early replies (first 3)

62158601
>>62158557
Neet
Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.
might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

62158623
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

while waging at walmart is impossible

62158626
>>62158557
I prefer to be a neet, but ofc neither situation is perfect. Now if i was getting pussy then we'd be talking

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62159339
>>62159334
lol okay

62159346
>>62158601
ULTRA
BASED

62159363
>>62159346
good goyim

62159365
>>62159339
Why is that for funny? Rude.
I tell chatgpt my positions and it literally tells me “that is a mini hedgefun position.”
Sometimes I browse business sites and sometimes it literally shows hedgefunds opening positions that are the same as mine.

62159382
>>62158666

uh...
checked?

satan raped goybug post? is this not a sign?

62159440
>>62158557
>Is A worse or B?
do you feel useful while in A or B? Whichever you don't get bored in would be less worse

62159473
>>62159440
>“The key is the ability, whether innate or conditioned, to find the other side of the rote, the picayune, the meaningless, the repetitive, the pointlessly complex. To be, in a word, unborable. It is the key to modern life. If you are immune to boredom, there is literally nothing you cannot accomplish.”
- David Foster Wallace

62159483
>>62158601
Had me until the girl part. If she's doing it with you that easy, she's done/doing with other dudes too.

62159502
Most NEETs sail away their life cuz they think they're 'min maxing' or somehow 'gaming' the system, only to game themselves.
I use the NEET free time to study and learn skills, i train for half-marathon and take care of my mental, physical and spiritual self. My apartment is spotless. I just recently married. My wife appreciates me, as i do her. Recently i've begun to look for a good paying job so i can give her and our kids a good life. Its a work that has to be done (tho i have always worked a few months a year so i can travel a month to Asia every year).

62159513
>>62158557
wagie

ive been NEET for 11 months after losing my job. I want and need a job so bad i miss having money god damn. Ill even take a mcwage job but those only go to illegal mexicans who dont know english i get ghosted by them too

62159515
>>62159513
fuck i mean NEET is worse

62159554
>>62159513
>i miss having money god damn
but then you'll miss the free time to do cool shit you can only do while NEETing

62159563
>>62159502
lol
lmao

62159628
being neet sucks immensely after like a year tops

62159697
>>62159628
I have neeting for 12 years

62159870
>>62158557
neet life is utterly depressing and you end up enjoying nothing, we have not evolved to not be productive
>t. 36 years old neet

62159886
>>62159870
Why aren’t you productive? I been neeting 12 years.

62159896
It depends on the type of wagie. I don't understand people who can't do better than a typical retail.warehouse job. How retarded do you have to be to be unable to get any white collar job?

62159910
>>62159886
I have chronic depression so I have zero drive and also generalized anxiety and get panic attacks trying to apply to jobs and I'm generally very uncomfortable around people

62159930
>>62159910
Not to sound like a dick but youre not “neet”, youre mentally ill. You give neets a bad name.

62159982
>>62158557
WFH jobs are basically NEET Premium.

62159990
>>62158557
NEET has no money to invest so they miss everything lol

62159993
>>62158557
They're both lousy, just in different ways.

62160017
>>62159930
what the fuck do you think neet stands for you retard, being neet doesn't make you cool you dumb zoomer

62160033
>>62158601
this will make neets seethe

62160048
>>62158601
> Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize. might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

He is speaking in context of somebody that is not a normie. For people who are not normie tier or higher jobs are a massive humiliation ritual. Neetdom is sad but it’s much better than every day humiliation

62160055
>>62159212
Nice looking dog

62160089
>>62160017
You are mentally ill + neet. You gotta make that clear. I am neet but not mentally ill.

62160116
>>62160055
Much appreciated, fren. I've been clearing out all the cacti in the area for her today

62160200
>>62160089
who gives a shit? it's neet either way, you think you're well adjusted? bitch you can't even get a job.

item.title: Sigh. So McDonald’s did it. They released the McValue® menu where each item is under $3. This new gimmick replaced the p… — 51 replies — 9.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Sigh. So McDonald’s did it. They released the McValue® menu where each item is under $3. This new gimmick replaced the p…

Open thread • Replies: 51 • Updated: 2026-04-27 02:32 UTC

OP

Sigh. So McDonald’s did it. They released the McValue® menu where each item is under $3. This new gimmick replaced the previous “Buy One, Add One for $1” menu AKA the only reason to have the app anymore after the deals turned to shit. I’ve also noticed with this update the drink prices increased by $0.20, a $0.40 increase YoY in my area. Yesterday I was starving after work but drove straight passed McDonald’s out of pure anger. Went home and ate some eggs and toast.

Thoughts?

Early replies (first 3)

62155716
>>62155708
Give it up, brother. Your fat ass doesn't need to be eating McDick's anyway.

62155723
>>62155708
For me, it's Wendy's. They still have a decent meal deal although it has gone up $1 over the past couple years. Ironically they have been a better value than Micky d's for a little while now.
>>62155716
Sounds like projection tb.h

62155728
>>62155708
learn to cook

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62155943
>>62155708
"Product"

62155947
>>62155922

62155976
>>62155922
>Fast food doesn’t deserve our money anymore.
while the quality of ingredients at least outside the US has improved massively over the years, the overall price-to-value ratio has reached a point where you can get proper food at a restaurant for sometimes less but more often than not the same amount of money.
it just doesn't make sense anymore and too much of it is still bad for you so I guess I agree with you there.

62156013
McD is like the only cheap fast food place at this point.

$7.59 for a large meal. I just checked Wendys for a similar meal and they charge $11.59!

62156034
Will ozempic taken by every fatass in the country make mcdonalds drop their prices or will the influx of thinner people that think they can suddenly eat more make them raise?

62156037
>>62155708
It was $2.12 using the apps 40% off deal to get my one double cheeseburger because I didn't want two for $4, now it's $1.70. This works out better for me as long as they don't remove the app discount.

62156039
>>62155708
ill have 2 large fries no salt
4 mcdoubles extra onion extra ketchup add mayo
4 hot and spicy mcchickens extda mayo extra lettuce
40 mcnuggets all habanero ranch
big mac
uhhhhhhhhhhhh

62156052
>>62155737
>Top post on the FIRE subreddit is complaining about how much the price of taco bell has increased
If Taco Bell impacts your finances that much then you don't have enough to retire

62156090
>he didn’t take profits on the $5 meal deal
ngmi

62156160
>>62155732
Ok but why visit a real restaurant or at least some small business?

62156273
>>62155708
That fucking mcchicken used to be $1. Why is mcniggers still trying to call this shit a “value” menu.

62156289
>>62156273
yeah in 1980 dude. holy fuck for a finance subreddit this place sure does suck sometimes.
picrel is the menu around 1975.

62156291
>>62156273
honestly it should still be a buck, no way that sandwich costs more than 50 cents to make

62156292
>>62156289
the mcchicken was a dollar in the 2010's

62156294
>>62156292
sure, and rent was $500 and employees only made $4 per hour and insurance rates were cheap and franchising costs were cheap.

62156301
>>62156294
Why are you mad and wrong?
>>62156292
This poster is factually accurate. McD is crazy expensive now.

62156370
>>62155708
>crying that his goysyrup went up 20¢

62156472
>>62156160
Because I cannot be in two places at the same time. At least not in my corporeal form.

62156693
>>62155708
What happened to the DOLLAR MENU

Not the buy one and get one for a dollar I mean

THE DOLLAR MENU

62156721
>>62155716
I mean really. If the price of McDonald's is so high it bothers you then you're eating too much McDonald's, no way around it.

62156722
>>62155737
There has been a resurgence in smug girl posts with quality rebuttals

62156723
>>62155976
At this point it's a mouse trap

62156726
>>62155708
Fast food doesn't understand people eat their slop solely because its cheap. Probably for the better they price themselves out since people don't need to be eating that garbage anyways

62156731
These $5 meals are pathetic because I would need at least 2 of them to feel satisfied.

62156748
>>62155708
nothing on that menu should be over 99¢, and half of it should be less than 75¢

62157963
>>62155708
Those product looks gross

62160402
>>62155708
Someone posted the prices and the undrr $3 menu was all over $3. I went and verified that indeed a small fry now costs over $3. $3+ for a hash brown is crazy too

62160426
>>62156013
Steak and shake, without the soft drink (you dont want the sugar syrup anyway) is usually around 8 dollars. And thats for a double

62160513
Homesteading and Asian waifu for laifu!

62160537
>>62155729
Yours is still fast? My burger king staffed by niggers takes, no joke, 20 minutes to finish an order and the McDonald's is a full 5 minutes minimum

item.title: Polkadot - Mumbai Warrior Edition — 96 replies — 9.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - Mumbai Warrior Edition

Open thread • Replies: 96 • Updated: 2026-04-26 21:48 UTC

OP

Hello my fellow PolkaCurry brothers. We are again here, for another thread where we discuss everything related to DOT, Mumbai (the city of DOT), curry and more. The last thread was a resounding success, we managed to keep it alive for literally 41 days. We got paid 11500 + 5*150 = 12250 DOT for the thread and are now living in a period of enlightenment while eating with METAL spoons. Brothers, we have truly reached enlightenment. WE, the Mumbai Warriors will strike yet again and collect generations worth of money !

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

Early replies (first 3)

62115437
We are eating with our METAL spoons in Mumbai. No more hands my brethren. We eat with out spoons, like proud warriors.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62115624
>>62115424
>>62115437

Still gonna larp as an Indian?

62115793
>>62115437

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62129040
>>62128205
No, its actual autistic retard

62129456
>>62129040
Impossible, look at the time stamps of the posts

62129518
>>62129040
>>62129456
No, it's actually Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62131415
100$ end of bull run


Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62131658
It is still cheap right now. Don't buy my bags at 25$. You can buy them now at 1.28$. Don't FOMO in at 50$ guys.

62131731
>>62116681
>What exactly does it have that sets it apart from Solona and ETH?
Solana has a success rate associated with it's transactions (see https://solscan.io/analytics). That's kind of fucked up that there's a 10 to 20% chance your tx might not get processed, right? I've never seen a DOT tx fail. DOT doesn't even measure failed tx https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily&relay-chain=polkadot&chains= because there are none. If you submit a tx it'll complete within like 6s to 30s. The longest a tx takes is when you transfer from one corechain to another. So when you bridge (use a HRMP channel) between corechains. And even that never took longer than like 40s from my personal experience. It's bizarre to me that literally up to 20% of the tx simply fail.
Another thing is that SOL literally has more "vote" transactions than anything else; https://solscan.io/analytics#txs . And vote transactions are LITERALLY validator messages to keep the network running. DOT doesn't count that as a tx at all. 60 to 80% of the tx on SOL are from validators to keep the network running. That's insane to think about that you need more tx to run the network than the users use to execute stuff. People are stupid for thinking that SOL processes 3k TPS. More than half of that is just to keep the network running. It's a literal scam number to be honest. It's just to make the normies believe that the network isn't a scam. The number of transactions is completely fake in a sense.
And again, the funny thing is that 1 core of DOT will be able to handle more TPS than the whole of SOL once either JAM or NOMT hit. Maybe even before that once the 500ms Basti blocks hit. If you combine 500ms blocks + JAM + NOMT one core of DOT will be able to probably do anywhere between 2 to 5x more than SOL as a whole and DOT has LITERALLY 100 cores and this will also probably be scaled to more sooner or later. It'll sooner or later scale to about 300 to 500 cores.

62131777
>>62116681
>>62131731
The 300-500 cores are after the network upgrades to 1000 validators from 600 and after a few more future optimizations. But DOT can then scale further by adding more relay chains. So, currently there is 1 relay chain that connects all the corechains (while they also have direct connections through the HRMP channels) and this relay chain has 600 active validators at any given time. At some point DOT could scale further by having multiple relay chains and separate validators on each relay chain and then having a "relay chain" that connects the relay chains. Sure, this would fragment liquidity in a sense but you could still transfer assets between the relay chains in probably like 30s or so... So in a sense the fragmented liquidity would be a non-problem. DOT is truly scalable while other chains simply are not. DOT covered all the problems because Gavin used to develop ETH and noticed "OMG, this won't work out" and then he left ETH in order to develop DOT. DOT is ETH done right in a sense. ETH is just BTC with smart contracts and DOT is an actual solution to all the problems that plague ETH and all the other smart contract platforms.

62135297
100$ end of bull run

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62137662
Soon we shall reach the nirvana of 75$ my Mumbai brothers. Then we shall eat with silver spoons.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62139771
You are not the body, you are not the mind, you are not your emotions. You are the silent DOT in the infinity of consciousness. You are just a wave in the ocean of consciousness that forgot it is part of the ocean. For when rememberance dawns, the mystery is not solved. It is lived.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62141372
My brethren, the time is nigh. We're break out. The wave of consciousness is breaking free from the ocean floor.

62143550
Any second now BTC will erupt into a storm that has never been seen before. DOT will soon start it's ascension to the heavens for 75$+. We, the Mumbai warriors, shall eat with silver spoons very soon. The time is coming my warriors. You still have to to buy a big fat bag of DOT before you get priced out.

62143825
>>62129518
>>62131415
>>62131658
>>62131731
>>62131777
>>62135297
>>62139771
>>62143550

This is sad. Also stop larping as an Indian and perhaps you'll get engagement

62144010
>>62143825
>This is sad.
My brother, the sadness is in your own heart. Not mine. You are destroying yourself.

>Also stop larping as an Indian and perhaps you'll get engagement
My brother, I am the one and only Vishnu Kumar. Born and raised in India. I am brown as the mud itself. There is no denying it. I am a true Mumbai warrior. I am a proud Indian.
Also Panjali, didn't people teach you that questions are fundamental for a healthy conversation. My young Panjali, I am not here for engagement. If you asked I would've told you so. Oh young Panjali. You still have a long way ahead of you. If accept, I let go, I move on and I forgive you young Panjali.

Thank you for you kind bump of the thread Panjali. I shall later come to your house and give you your share of the profits.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62146419
My fellow Mumbai warriors. We are all already enlightened, we just need to uncover it. DOT is already the best chain, people just need to realize it. They're still looking at the shadow of their light and misidentifying it for themselves. Soon they shall become aware of it and pivot towards the light.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62148896
100$ end of bull run. Remember my Mumbai warriors. It is still cheap as dirt itself. You want to buy now, before you the GIGA ULTRA MEGA pump happens and you get priced out.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62149307
>>62148896
And then have this larping indian short you

62151325
>>62149307
Pssssstttttt Kamal. Do you want to eat with your hands again or do you want the Mumbai warriors to eat like true kings? With spoons? Young warrior Kamal, you have still much to learn.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62153932
100$ end of bull run

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62155237
My brothers... nirvana is near, it's just around the corner. Stack up on DOT right now or get priced out.

62156822
My Mumbai brethren. I've been informed that the Palk Strait will be closed by the Mumbai warriors. We will now toll all ships and they'll have to pay the toll in DOT.

62157778
>>62115424
Im tired

62158070
>>62157778
Good my brother. The first step to enlightenment is to admit and accept that you're tired. You first need to see your darkness in order for you to bring the light. Those who seek the light have experienced immense darkness. Brother, this is a moment of rejoice. Accept your pain, let it go, move on and forgive yourself or the people who have cause it. But remember brother the world is simply an illusion and by that I mean your own perception of reality. It's all inside you and not in the outside world. A river is not beautiful or magnificent, that's your illusion of it. A river is simply water that is moving, nothing more, nothing less. The illusion feels real because just like when you dream the pain feels real, the fear feels real, the sorrow feels real. Once you wake up from the dream you realize that nothing was real, that it was just an illusion. But it is true that when you were in the dream the pain felt real. So, once we see the illusion for what it is it'll start dissolving and once it dissolves that's then the reason to work inside the world without attachments and to help those who are asleep to wake up.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158170
>>62157778
>>62158070
>The first step to enlightenment is to admit and accept that you're tired.
And then the last step to enlightenment is to realize that there are no steps to enlightenment. It was always there. It was just covered by conditioning, traumas, the ego, ... . Once all of those dissolve it'll uncover enlightenment. So, enlightenment isn't an achievement or something you do, it's literally that you stop doing. It's the fact that the doer stops. The watcher and the watched go away. The only thing that remains is the watching.

62158427
>>
Metoo

62158494
>>62158427
... You forgot to green text young Vishnu mind of the block chain. You too what?

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158686
If you try to tell a person, "Hey bro, there's hope. You're not a loser. I have faith in you. I think you're a good person.", what do they do? They argue with you. They're defended against that. They intellectualize, "There may be hope for other people, but there's no hope for me.". Such a potent intellectual defense mechanism. And what are they defending against? The belief of hope. Because hope hurts. If there's zero chance, there's zero need for effort. See, human beings are really resilient. We can live through genocide and holocaust and all kinds of stuff. We can live through all kinds of terrible things, terrible economic times. We're survivors. But don't give us hope, because if we can hope, we can hurt.

Having hope also exposes you to hurt. And hurt is a normal part of life. If you're hurting that means you're human. It's just. Are you going to hurt consciously and change something or are you going to hurt unconsciously and keep on hurting due to the same thing for the rest of your life?

You maybe haven't "You go this" at the moment. You may feel powerless. You may feel down. And at the same time you'll slowly and gradually regain your power. You'll unburden the weight. Sooner or later you'll feel so light you'll start flying. I really believe that, even though it may at the current moment not feel like it. Even though you might feel like the current moment is never ending trust me, it'll all change and reshape into a healthier future. You got this fren who's reading this.

Your dear Vishnu Kumar wishes you are peaceful day. May Vishnu of the mindchain be with and all around you.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158906
>>62157778
metoo

62158991
>>62158906
That information helps a lot. Thank you for sharing. Now what do we do about that?

62159732
100$ end of bull run. No shot we miss nirvana


Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

item.title: >tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this? — 73 replies — 8.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
>tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this?

Open thread • Replies: 73 • Updated: 2026-04-26 23:05 UTC

OP

>tfw fell for the NEET meme
how the fuck can you guys endure this? it's so boring and depressing, I unironically miss my wagecuck 9-5

Early replies (first 3)

62156768
I would unironically wagecuck still if I was able to take vacation whenever I want. I don't enjoyed scheduling things like that or requiring permission.

62156775
>>62156751
I became a neet because of crippling social anxiety, not out of choice.
I suspect many are the same.

62156779
>>62156751
see you fell for it without having any money, I did that once and then realized that it costs money to do anything other than sit in front of a screen all day every day

Depending on where you live, even going out for a walk will cost you bus fare or gas to get to a decent park. Never felt so trapped, now if I had money to go out and do things like camping or fishing or even just cook nice meals then I would have been a lot happier

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62157769
>been neet since 2020
The biggest thing I have faced is what do you do when you have nothing to cope with? Most people's lives involve working and doing something to blow off steam after work. So it becomes a stress/release cycle. The boredom that comes is from doing all the release without the stress part. eventually your brain gets bored, and you don't really know who you are outside of that cycle.

Other consequences are that you don't realize how much structure a job really provides you. Sleep schedule, social outlets, and sense of belonging, to name a few. You really have to have your shit together because once that structure is gone, you're only left with yourself.

Some pro's are that you can really slow down to learn yourself. Take a full week trying something to see if it's for you. I've gone to college just to be a frat boy, went to a lineman school to see blue collar life, and worked in a bank to see white collar. More experiences than most, and my idea of the ideal life for me has formed more out of these experiences, without the pressure of needing to succeed in those fields. Which strangely makes me perform better "detachment" wink wink.

>become a master of finding and routing out your negative self-defeating talk
This is another pro, you get a lot of time to work on, and I believe Jesus when he said the kingdom of heaven is within you. When you can sit quietly with your mind, you can view your patterns clearly over a long period of time, and with the help of a therapist, really root out the major mental blocks.

You need to be selfish and learn yourself (slay your dragon) before you start your real life. Many people I see are so eager to pursue their career, family, and goals without knowing why they even want them.

62157987
>>62156751
Did this, regretted it. My advice is if you're gonna beer then have a social life, healthy diet and ample amounts of sunlight. Also learn something. If you don't want to be a wagie then ok but isolating yourself leads to mental and psychological issues.

62158467
i was a neet for 10 (ten) years no im working in a corporate office like a pajeet from the helpdesk but still

62158571
>>62156751
I haven't worked since 2015, but sometimes I have dreams where I decide to show up at my old work and just go to my desk and start working like nothing happened. During the dream I go to work for a year, working for free before I decide to ask my boss to start paying me, including back pay. He says "no" and starts laughing and I wake up in a panic.
What a nightmare that is, i hate that recurring dream.

62158622
you have to do something, you have to have an activity and goals. It's easy for me to say because I went to school for CS so my hobby is programming and so I can just spend all day in front of a PC and feel fulfilled, but if you're not into that you need to find some activity you can do that won't bankrupt you and provide you with meaning.

The germans were right, work will set you free, but people conflate wagecucking with work. Being a wagecuck will not set you free

62158636
>>62156751
I had to persuade myself that not having a job was worse than looking for a job.

62158971
>>62158000

62159187
>>62156838
Honestly man. I have so much backlog of shit in my life. I wish I could just step into a pocket universe while the real world stops moving, and I go through my backlog.
So many little projects, so many books, so much art. It’s fucking sad really. Here is a boundless, limitless consciousness, limited to a decaying body and a pathetic time limit of which you can only use 16 or so hours
It’s a sick joke really.
>>62156871
Actually there is something else, well in my case.
Without a job, I feel like I am not earning money that I can produce using my skills, and so I kinda don’t feel calm and focused enough to spend time on hobbies. Basically i felt like I am wasting my time, aging, without having any money to help me out, and so I felt too anxious to commit to any hobby.

62159864
>>62156751
most people are NEET incorrectly, living like bums or mooching off their parents when you SHOULD be mooching off the government
Go get on welfare. Go get on food assistance. Go get on whatever you can and get free gibs from the government.

I get almost $300 a month in foodstamps and $450 in cash assistance. My rent is subsidized based on my income so I pay pennies. I apply for energy assistance programs to pay my light bill for over half the year. I never have to work and all I do is sit around all day long, watch youtube, listen to music, read manga, play video games, draw, and lurk.
